import json

Bash(cd "C:/Users/iflytek/Desktop/code/files" && python -c "
import json
with open\('nnsa_data/nnsa_regulations.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)
total = 0
pdf_count = 0
html_count = 0
for cat, items in data.items\(\):
    n = len\(items\)
    total += n
    pdfs = sum\(1 for i in items if i.get\('type'\) == 'pdf'\)
    htmls = n - pdfs
    pdf_count += pdfs
    html_count += htmls
    flag = ' \(有翻页\)' if n > 20 else ''
    print\(f'  {cat}: {n} 条 \(PDF:{pdfs}, HTML:{htmls}\){flag}'\)
print\(f'\\n总计: {total} 条 \(PDF: {pdf_count}, HTML: {html_count}\)'\)
" 2>&1)

    data = json.load\(f\)
for cat, items in data.items\(\):

            print\(f'分类: {cat}'\)

            print\(f'URL: {item[\\"url\\"]}'\)

import requests
url = 'https://nnsa.mee.gov.cn/ztzl/fgbzwjk/haqdz/fsxtwshsxzzjdglxl_33741/202304/P020230406626616259030.doc?keywords='
filepath = 'nnsa_data/pdfs/核安全导则_放射性废物管理系列导则/放射性废物近地表处置设施.doc'
session = requests.Session\(\)
session.headers.update\({'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0', 'Referer': 'https://nnsa.mee.gov.cn/ztzl/fgbzwjk/'}\)
resp = session.get\(url, timeout=60, stream=True\)
resp.raise_for_status\(\)
with open\(filepath, 'wb'\) as f:
    for chunk in resp.iter_content\(8192\):
        f.write\(chunk\)
import os
size = os.path.getsize\(filepath\)
print\(f'下载成功: {filepath} \({size/1024:.0f} KB\)'\)
")

Bash(cd "C:/Users/iflytek/Desktop/code/files" && python -c "
import os

base = 'nnsa_data/pdfs'
grand_total = 0
grand_pdf = 0
grand_doc = 0
grand_size = 0

groups = {
    '一、法律法规': ['国家法律', '行政法规', '规章', '规范性文件'],
    '二、核安全导则': [
        '核安全导则_通用系列导则',
        '核安全导则_核动力厂系列导则',
        '核安全导则_研究堆系列导则',
        '核安全导则_非堆核燃料循环设施系列导则',
        '核安全导则_放射性废物管理系列导则',
        '核安全导则_核材料管制系列导则',
        '核安全导则_民用核安全设备监督管理系列导则',
        '核安全导则_放射性物品运输管理系列导则',
    ],
    '三、标准': [
        '标准_通用系列',
        '标准_核动力厂系列',
        '标准_研究堆系列',
        '标准_放射性废物管理系列',
        '标准_放射性物品运输管理系列',
        '标准_放射性同位素和射线装置监督管理系列',
        '标准_辐射环境系列',
    ],
    '四、国际公约': ['国际公约'],
}

sep = '=' * 64
dash = '-' * 60

for group_name, folders in groups.items\(\):
    group_count = 0
    group_pdf = 0
    group_doc = 0
    group_size = 0
    lines = []

    for folder in folders:
        path = os.path.join\(base, folder\)
        if not os.path.isdir\(path\):
            continue
        files = os.listdir\(path\)
        count = len\(files\)
        pdf_c = sum\(1 for f in files if f.endswith\('.pdf'\)\)
        doc_c = sum\(1 for f in files if f.endswith\('.doc'\) or f.endswith\('.docx'\)\)
        folder_size = sum\(os.path.getsize\(os.path.join\(path, f\)\) for f in files\)
        display = folder.replace\('核安全导则_', ''\).replace\('标准_', ''\)
        size_mb = folder_size / 1024 / 1024
        lines.append\('    %-28s  %3d 个文件  \(%.1f MB\)' % \(display, count, size_mb\)\)
        group_count += count
        group_pdf += pdf_c
        group_doc += doc_c
        group_size += folder_size

    gsize_mb = group_size / 1024 / 1024
    print\(group_name\)
    print\('  小计: %d 个文件 | PDF: %d | DOC: %d | 大小: %.1f MB' % \(group_count, group_pdf, group_doc, gsize_mb\)\)
    print\('  ' + dash\)
    for l in lines:
        print\(l\)
    print\(\)

    grand_total += group_count
    grand_pdf += group_pdf
    grand_doc += group_doc
    grand_size += group_size

gsize_mb = grand_size / 1024 / 1024
print\(sep\)
print\('总计: %d 个文件 | PDF: %d | DOC: %d | 总大小: %.1f MB' % \(grand_total, grand_pdf, grand_doc, gsize_mb\)\)
print\(sep\)
" 2>&1)

import sys, os, time
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from core.scheduler import Scheduler

s = Scheduler\('wna'\)
pending = s.task_manager.get_pending\(\)[:5]
s._total = len\(pending\)
for i, task in enumerate\(pending\):
    s._process_article\(task, i+1\)
    time.sleep\(2\)
s.task_manager.save\(\)
s._print_summary\(\)
s.close\(\)
" 2>&1)
